title: Handy Bags
description: Handy Bags solves all inventory issues for builders!
body:
Adding Items to the Handy Bags

![The Handy Bag functions like a bundle, except it has 9 inventory slots like a shulker.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a9fdb3b075c31f2d8f872273eaeb8365ab830eb.gif)


    Same functionality as the bundle, except holds 9 unique stacks instead of 64 blocks total

Selecting Items within the Handy Bags

![You can select items within the Handy Bag using a radial menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eff771881ae663ff8fa970811116c36a71807928.gif)
    
    Through a radial menu (r)
    Through scroll wheel + alt
    Through cycle next/previous slot keys (arrow keys)

Using Blocks from the Handy Bags

![You can place blocks that are within the Handy Bag](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41542e2173a3cfbfda0d3223f9fcfc63fa9cbc80.gif)
    
    It never uses up the last block in the bag

Using Tools from the Handy Bags

![Digging with the handy bag will not work when the tool is out of durability](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a87b1f0be348d4adfc48e4d0a97748ac8d9eb7c3.gif)
    
    It never uses a tool without any durability

Refilling the handy bag

![Shift Right click wiht a handy bag on a container will refill the handy bag](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a284451ca85be0c4694956227ba02caaf13fde45.gif)

    Shift Right Click on a container will refill all stacks in the handy bag if possible

Pick Block (middle mouse button)

    Handy bags will be priorised over stacks in the inventory

Crafting recipe

    1 chest, 1 iron ingot and 1 leather (shapeless)

Planned Features

    Colored Handy Bags
    Using weapons in Handy Bags
    Using items in Handy Bags
